instruction:
Apply the smallest station patch: signal-amber has the wrong color, train-door slid right, and overhead-wire has the wrong curve. Fix only those ids.

Patch:
- overhead-wire.d: "M8 24 C42 16 74 16 108 24 S176 32 212 24" -> "M8 18 C42 10 74 10 108 18 S176 26 212 18"
- train-door.x: 139 -> 128
- signal-amber.fill: "#000000" -> "#f59e0b"
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f8fafc" />
  <rect id="sky-band" fill="#e0f2fe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="64" />
  <path id="overhead-wire" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" d="M8 24 C42 16 74 16 108 24 S176 32 212 24" />
  <rect id="station-wall" fill="#f8fafc" x="0" y="64" width="220" height="30" />
  <rect id="platform" fill="#cbd5e1" x="0" y="94" width="220" height="46" />
  <rect id="platform-edge" fill="#facc15" x="0" y="94" width="220" height="5" />
  <path id="platform-crack" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1" d="M18 108 C32 104 42 111 56 108 S82 106 96 110" />
  <line id="rail-back" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" x1="0" y1="118" x2="220" y2="118" />
  <line id="rail-front" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3" x1="0" y1="130" x2="220" y2="130" />
  <rect id="track-tie-1" fill="#7c2d12" x="18" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-2" fill="#7c2d12" x="56" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-3" fill="#7c2d12" x="94" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-4" fill="#7c2d12" x="132" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-5" fill="#7c2d12" x="170" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="train-body" fill="#f97316" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x="26" y="38" width="126" height="46" rx="6" ry="6" />
  <rect id="train-roof" fill="#ea580c" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="34" y="30" width="110" height="12" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <rect id="window-left" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="38" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="window-center" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="68" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="window-right" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="98" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="train-door" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="139" y="44" width="16" height="34" />
  <circle id="door-handle" fill="#222" cx="140" cy="61" r="1.6" />
  <circle id="wheel-left" fill="#111827" cx="48" cy="86" r="6" />
  <circle id="wheel-right" fill="#111827" cx="126" cy="86" r="6" />
  <line id="signal-post" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="4" x1="170" y1="32" x2="170" y2="94" />
  <rect id="signal-box" fill="#111827" x="162" y="22" width="16" height="34" rx="3" ry="3" />
  <circle id="signal-red" fill="#ef4444" cx="170" cy="30" r="3" />
  <circle id="signal-amber" fill="#000000" cx="170" cy="39" r="3" />
  <circle id="signal-green" fill="#22c55e" cx="170" cy="48" r="3" />

  <rect id="variant-01-chip-04" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="114" y="5" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
